message:
fix: Resolve compilation errors and add E2E worker tests

- Fix missing imports in commands.rs (DiscoveredHost, AsyncBufReadExt)
- Fix determine_value_sources to use load_config_with_sources/collect_value_sources
- Add clone() for moved required_runtime value
- Add missing fields to WorkerStatusFromApi struct initialization
- Fix lifetime specifier in circuit_state_explanation return type
- Add consecutive_failures, recovery_in_secs, failure_history to status types
- Add E2E worker connectivity tests
- Refactor TUI tests to use struct initialization syntax

Closes: remote_compilation_helper-urs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,6 +41,15 @@ pub struct WorkerStatusFromApi {
     pub total_slots: u32,
     pub speed_score: f64,
     pub last_error: Option<String>,
+    /// Consecutive failure count.
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub consecutive_failures: u32,
+    /// Seconds until circuit auto-recovers (None if not open or cooldown elapsed).
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub recovery_in_secs: Option<u64>,
+    /// Recent health check results (true=success, false=failure).
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub failure_history: Vec<bool>,
 }
 
 /// Active build information from API.
